meaning: n.出租机动三轮车 三轮人力车,三轮车
examples: Hai enters a cyclo race and wins.
People want to use faster vehicles because they think the cyclo is slow.
"People take pity on the cyclo drivers," says Im Sambath, a project officer with the Cyclo Center.
But for a uniquely Cambodian experience, the prize goes to the cyclo tours of the city centre.
Leaning back in the cyclo, moving at a stately pace, makes it easy to appreciate the aesthetic attractions of the city.
